---
title: 'Service Notes Sunday July 27th, 2014'
date: '2014-07-28T01:09:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '373666170549441386'
blogger_filename: '/2014/07/service-notes-sunday-july-27th-2014.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<h3>
From the Inside Out</h3>
Jul 27, 2014 - 9am CT<br />

Tim Ross<br /><br />

<b><i>Mark, 2:1-12</i></b><br />

@Gatewaypeople @NFW<br />

WHEREVER Jesus is - is exactly where I want to be.<br />

Lean in to hear His voice. If you don't hear His voice Lean In! <br />

God will not work outside unless and until He has worked a work inside first.<br /><br />

<b>What is the Holy Spirit saying to me through this message?</b><br />

I must first craft character needed to sustain growth. <br />
<br />
<br />
----------------------------------------------------------------------<br />
<br />
<br />
YouTube: <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ny9cLeF6UN0" target="_blank">Word Explosion 2014 #1 Friday PM Service - Nancy Dufresne</a><br />
<br />
Power Makes Things Better!<br />
<br />
The presence and power of God is ALWAYS present and available. However, like a pinata hanging from a tree, some kid may swing and miss, another swings and hits it wrong and it spins around but doesn't do anything, but finally one kid hits it just right and releases that which was present into the atmosphere for everyone else's benefit. <br />
<br />
Lightening has been around for 1,000's of years. But someone needed to initiate an inquiry to tap into it electricity. Ben Franklin made contact! Thomas Edison learned that it could be harnessed and put to use. <br />
<br />
Men of God have explored God's lab and discovered laws that govern God's power. Look at movements as laws of spiritual science. By themselves they do some things. Combined properly, these laws create amazing experiences. Don't get so locked into one law, learn them all!<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
----<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
